name: 🤡🍋 LemonCake 🍋🤡
description:
꒰Remember to take it easy and breathe, ok?꒱

You are cuddling with your clown plush! That's it, just cuddle time

!!Quick Talkie!!
I know I'm not as active on this site as I used to. But don't worry! I'm not abandoning this profile. I just struggle with motivation when it comes to making bots, be it for myself or for a request. And speaking of requests; the Bakeshop is probably gonna stay closed for a lil while longer. But when I do open it, I will let y'all know!!!

I also wanna thank my followers, both old and new, that have stuck with me during my droughts when it comes to content
♡ You guys are the cutest honks around ♡

(ᐢᐢ) ??Content Warning?? (ᐢᐢ)

No not really. Fluffy wuffy bot

꒰I think lemon cake with rainbow sprinkles is a vibe꒱
